name: Power Bracer
desc: Your Pokémon deal +20% damage

name: Wise Glasses
desc: +35% Sp.ATK / −35% Sp.DEF

name: Black Belt
desc: +35% ATK / −35% DEF

name: Pretty Wing
desc: Your Pokémon deal 50% less damage and take 50% less damage

name: Life Orb
desc: Your Pokémon deal 50% more damage and take 50% more damage

name: Shoal Salt
desc: Normal Pokémon heal 10% max HP each turn

name: Lucky Punch
desc: On KO: Normal Pokémon gain +10% max HP (for this fight) and full-heal

name: Bright Powder
desc: Normal Pokémon get 10% of HP as DEF & Sp.DEF

name: Body Plate
desc: Normal Pokémon deal an extra 5% of their max HP on hit

name: Light Clay
desc: Your Pokémon deal +5% damage for each different type on your team

name: Electirizer
desc: When an Electric Pokémon attacks, it gains +1 Speed for the rest of the run

name: Cell Battery
desc: At fight start, the first Electric Pokémon in your team makes one bonus attack

name: Electric Seed
desc: Electric Pokémon trigger on-attack traits and items twice

name: Yache Berry
desc: Pokémon get a random stat boost after every attack (max 6 per fight)

name: Sticky Barb
desc: Pokémon you hit get a random stat nerf after every attack

name: Macho Brace
desc: Your Pokémon deal half damage but attack twice

name: Leaf Stone
desc: Grass Pokémon deal 10% of enemy max HP and heal the same each turn

name: Tiny Mushroom
desc: Grass Pokémon use Spore instead of attacking (puts enemy to sleep, 50% wake/turn)

name: Big Mushroom
desc: When a Grass Pokémon heals, deal that much damage to all enemy Pokémon

name: Sitrus Berry
desc: All healing on your Pokémon is doubled

name: Aspear Berry
desc: When your Pokémon heals, it gets a random stat boost per 50 HP healed

name: Big Root
desc: Your Pokémon heal 20% of all damage inflicted on enemy Pokémon

name: Mind Plate
desc: Psychic splash damage deals +50%

name: Lansat Berry
desc: Psychic splash damage can crit

name: Smoke Ball
desc: Enemy Pokémon take +50% damage from non-attack sources (splash/poison/hazards)

name: Adrenaline Orb
desc: The Pokémon with more % max HP attacks first (ties → speed)

name: Weakness Policy
desc: +35% damage to already-damaged Pokémon

name: Spooky Plate
desc: Ghost Pokémon heal equal to execution damage

name: Dread Plate
desc: When Ghost executes a target, all other enemies get two random stat nerfs

name: Reaper Cloth
desc: Once per fight, when a Ghost Pokémon faints, the enemy active Pokémon gets executed

name: Focus Sash
desc: Each Pokémon survives a KO once per fight with 1 HP

name: Black Sludge
desc: When an enemy faints, your active Pokémon gets 3 random stat boosts

name: Air Balloon
desc: Flying Pokémon can dodge incoming attacks (more often the faster they are)

name: Sky Plate
desc: Flying Pokémon deal bonus damage based on how much faster they are (up to +50%)

name: Pretty Feather
desc: When a Flying Pokémon faints, the whole party gets +2 Speed

name: Float Stone
desc: If you're faster: on-hit deal % bonus damage that scales with the % Speed gap

name: Quick Powder
desc: The first Pokémon in your party gets +2 Speed (stage)

name: Silver Powder
desc: When a Bug Pokémon levels up, 30% chance to level up again

name: Insect Plate
desc: When a Bug Pokémon crits, it gains +20 levels for the rest of the combat

name: Shed Shell
desc: Bug Pokémon attacks reduce the enemy's level by 5 for the fight

name: Cleanse Tag
desc: +10% damage per level your Pokémon has over the target

name: Stardust
desc: Your Pokémon have a 10% chance to level up after each combat

name: Toxic Plate
desc: When a Poison Pokémon hits a poisoned target, stacks are doubled

name: Toxic Orb
desc: When a poisoned Pokémon faints, half its stacks pass to the next

name: Pecha Berry
desc: Your Poison Pokémon heal 2× the damage dealt by poison ticks

name: Kebia Berry
desc: Your Pokémon take 5% less damage per stack of poison on the enemy (max 60%)

name: Stealth Goggles
desc: Dark Pokémon gain crit chance equal to two-thirds of their level (%)

name: Razor Claw
desc: +35% crit chance. Crit chance above 100% becomes crit damage

name: Dark Stone
desc: Excessive damage from Dark Pokémon splashes to the next enemy

name: Oran Berry
desc: +10% crit chance. Heal 100% of damage inflicted on critical hits

name: Muscle Band
desc: +10% crit chance. On crit: +1 Speed and +1 ATK/Sp.ATK

name: Razor Fang
desc: +10% crit chance. Crits have a 50% chance to flinch the opponent

name: Flame Plate
desc: Fire Pokémon benefit +50% from ATK/Sp.ATK stages

name: Heat Rock
desc: Fire Pokémon share half their ATK/Sp.ATK boosts with their party

name: Magmarizer
desc: When a Fire Pokémon faints, half its current ATK/Sp.ATK buffs pass to a random Fire ally

name: Lum Berry
desc: Your Pokémon get two random stat boosts at fight start. Their stat stages are uncapped

name: Soothe Bell
desc: Start-of-fight traits and effects trigger twice

name: Destiny Knot
desc: When a Pokémon gains ATK/Sp.ATK, the active enemy loses the same amount

name: Never-Melt Ice
desc: Frozen-shatter damage is increased by 50%

name: Icy Rock
desc: After a shatter, re-freeze the target at the trait's freeze chance

name: Snowball
desc: +50% chance to freeze opponents

name: Casteliacone
desc: On-hit effects against enemies trigger twice

name: Sea Incense
desc: Water trait also lowers the enemy's DEF & Sp.DEF

name: Luminous Moss
desc: When a Water Pokémon is hit, it triggers the Water trait on the attacker

name: Mystic Water
desc: Your active Water Pokémon gains DOUBLE the ATK/Sp.ATK stages the enemy active loses

name: Eject Button
desc: When the enemy active faints, 50% of its negative stat stages carry to the next

name: Focus Band
desc: When your Pokémon faints, your Fighting Pokémon get +1 Speed

name: Fist Plate
desc: When a Fighting Pokémon KOs an enemy, it triggers the Fighting trait

name: Protective Pads
desc: A Fighting Pokémon survives a KO at 1 HP once per fight (triggers the Fighting trait)

name: Revival Herb
desc: Your Pokémon can't heal during combat, but fainted teammates start each fight at 1 HP

name: Soft Sand
desc: When a Ground Pokémon outspeeds its target, it deals 50% more damage

name: Earth Plate
desc: Ground Pokémon use their DEF in place of Sp.DEF when attacked

name: Iron Ball
desc: Enemies deal 10% less damage for each Speed stage they are missing

name: Mirror Herb
desc: When you debuff the enemy active, your active gains the same stat stage

name: Custap Berry
desc: When a Rock Pokémon faints, it explodes — dealing 25% of its move's damage to every enemy

name: Hard Stone
desc: Your Rock Pokémon become Sturdy — survive a KO at 1 HP once per fight

name: Rock Incense
desc: Rock Pokémon benefit +50% from DEF & Sp.DEF stages

name: Protector
desc: Your Pokémon deal +10% damage per positive DEF stage

name: Metal Powder
desc: Your Pokémon are 10% faster per positive Sp.DEF stage

name: Dragon Fang
desc: The first Dragon attack each combat always crits

name: Dragon Scale
desc: The first Dragon Pokémon to faint triggers the Dragon trait

name: Draco Plate
desc: The first Dragon attack each combat strikes twice

name: Metal Coat
desc: Damage the Steel trait blocks is reflected to the enemy active

name: Metal Alloy
desc: When a Steel Pokémon is attacked, it gains +1 DEF and +1 Sp.DEF

name: Binding Band
desc: Party slot 1 gains 50% of your team's total HP — but if it faints, the fight is over

name: Eject Pack
desc: Damage your active Pokémon takes is spread across your whole team

name: Pink Bow
desc: A Fairy Pokémon's attack has a 30% chance to attract (flinch) the target

name: Pixie Plate
desc: A Fairy Pokémon's attack also hits the 2nd Pokémon in the enemy party for 30% damage

name: Misty Seed
desc: At combat start, all your Fairy Pokémon fire one 10%-power attack

name: Iron Plate
desc: Your Pokémon take 50% less damage if they are slower than the attacker

name: Damp Rock
desc: +10% damage per negative stat stage on the enemy

name: Star Piece
desc: After every boss, replace your team with random Pokémon. They count as +1 for traits (not added to Pokédex or Hall of Fame).

name: Comet Shard
desc: On pickup: replace your team with random Pokémon 10 levels higher

name: Pure Incense
desc: +10% damage per held-item slot left empty on your team

name: Rocky Helmet
desc: When your Pokémon takes damage, it gains +1 DEF and +1 Sp.DEF

name: Lagging Tail
desc: If your Pokémon is slower, it takes % less damage equal to the Speed gap (up to 60%)

name: Poison Barb
desc: Your attacks apply +2 Poison stacks

name: Ring Target
desc: All moves are neutrally effective (yours and the enemy's)

name: HP Up
desc: When your Pokémon defeats an enemy, it gains +2 max HP for the rest of the run

name: Wacan Berry
desc: When an Electric Pokémon attacks, 20% chance to paralyze the enemy (skips its next turn)

name: Grassy Seed
desc: At fight start, Grass Pokémon gain +100% max HP but begin at 50% HP

name: Kasib Berry
desc: After a Ghost Pokémon defeats an enemy, it has a 50% chance to dodge the next attack

name: Coba Berry
desc: Your Pokémon deal +10% damage per positive Speed stage they have

name: Tanga Berry
desc: When a Bug Pokémon faints, your other Bug Pokémon each gain 20% of its level for the combat

name: Colbur Berry
desc: +10% crit chance. Your Pokémon gain dodge chance equal to half their crit chance

name: Occa Berry
desc: Fire Pokémon gain +2 ATK and +2 Sp.ATK at the start of the fight

name: Chilan Berry
desc: When an Ice Pokémon defeats an enemy, 50% chance the enemy's next Pokémon enters frozen

name: Chople Berry
desc: When a Fighting Pokémon defeats an enemy, all fainted Fighting Pokémon revive at 1 HP (the first becomes active)

name: Shuca Berry
desc: Enemy Pokémon lose 1 Speed stage when attacked

name: Smooth Rock
desc: When a Ground Pokémon defeats an enemy, it gains random stat boosts equal to twice the enemy's missing Speed stages

name: Charti Berry

name: Everstone

name: Haban Berry
desc: When a Dragon Pokémon defeats an enemy, it gains +2 Speed

name: Babiri Berry
desc: Your Pokémon take 10% less damage per Steel type on your team (max 40%)

name: Roseli Berry

name: Shiny Power
desc: Your Pokémon deal +10% damage for each shiny on your team

name: Shiny Guard

name: Shiny Hunter
desc: Your shiny rate is doubled for the rest of the run

name: Legend's Call
desc: On pickup, replace your team with random non-shiny legendaries

name: Legend Might
desc: Your Pokémon deal +20% damage for each legendary on your team

name: Legend Aegis

name: Resonance

name: Legend Lure

name: Power Lens
desc: Your stat boosts are 30% more effective

name: Iron Thorns
desc: Enemy Pokémon take 20% of their attack as recoil

name: Quick Claw
